83680f81-e14e-472e-ac8a-b03d0a9860f5.question: plot the graph for orders and users
83680f81-e14e-472e-ac8a-b03d0a9860f5.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count 
FROM customer c 
LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id 
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name 
ORDER BY order_count DESC 
LIMIT 100
83680f81-e14e-472e-ac8a-b03d0a9860f5.summary: The query returned 30 rows of customer data, including customer_id, name, and order_count. All customers have placed 1 order.

83680f81-e14e-472e-ac8a-b03d0a9860f5.question: compare list of products and users
83680f81-e14e-472e-ac8a-b03d0a9860f5.generated_sql:
SELECT p.product_id, p.name, c.customer_id, c.name 
FROM product p 
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id 
LEFT JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id 
LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id 
GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name, c.customer_id, c.name 
ORDER BY p.product_id 
LIMIT 100
83680f81-e14e-472e-ac8a-b03d0a9860f5.summary: The query returned 30 rows of product and customer data, including product_id, name, customer_id, and name. The product_ids range from 1 to 30 and are associated with various customer_ids.

83680f81-e14e-472e-ac8a-b03d0a9860f5.generated_sql:

LIMIT 100

83680f81-e14e-472e-ac8a-b03d0a9860f5.question: who all ordered Iphone
83680f81-e14e-472e-ac8a-b03d0a9860f5.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.name 
FROM customer c 
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id 
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id 
JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id 
WHERE p.name = 'Iphone' 
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name 
ORDER BY c.customer_id 
LIMIT 100
83680f81-e14e-472e-ac8a-b03d0a9860f5.summary: The query returned data about customers who ordered Iphone, including customer_id and name. The results are grouped by customer_id and name, and ordered by customer_id.

JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id 
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id 
JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id

ORDER BY item_count DESC

b4f0440e-135d-46a9-9627-04941276e284.generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, p.name AS product_name, oi.quantity, oi.price 
FROM customer c 
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id 
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id

59918220-8b97-40ad-b0c6-1eaea46660fb.question: give me the list of repeated orders
59918220-8b97-40ad-b0c6-1eaea46660fb.generated_sql:
SELECT o.order_id, c.customer_id, c.name, c.email, p.product_id, p.name AS product_name, oi.quantity 
FROM customer c 
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id 
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id 
JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id 
WHERE (o.customer_id, p.product_id) IN (
  SELECT o.customer_id, p.product_id 
  FROM customer c 
  JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id 
  JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id 
  JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id 
  GROUP BY o.customer_id, p.product_id 
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) > 1
) 
LIMIT 100
59918220-8b97-40ad-b0c6-1eaea46660fb.summary:
The query is designed to fetch repeated orders from the database, 
              including order_id, customer_id, customer name, email, product_id, 
              and product name. However, the rows are empty, suggesting no data 
              or no repeated orders found within the given limit of 100.

59918220-8b97-40ad-b0c6-1eaea46660fb.question: give me the repeated categories of product
59918220-8b97-40ad-b0c6-1eaea46660fb.generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS category_name, p.name AS product_name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS repeated_orders_count 
FROM category c 
JOIN product p ON c.category_id = p.category_id 
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id 
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id 
WHERE (o.customer_id, p.product_id) IN (
  SELECT o.customer_id, p.product_id 
  FROM customer c 
  JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id 
  JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id 
  JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id 
  GROUP BY o.customer_id, p.product_id 
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) > 1
) 
GROUP BY c.name, p.name 
LIMIT 100

c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.question: give me top 10 users
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.generated_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM cart GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY COUNT(cart_id) DESC LIMIT 10
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.summary: Top 10 users by cart count are customer_id 1 to 10.

c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.question: give me top 10 customer details
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.generated_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, c.email, c.phone_number, c.date_of_birth FROM customers c JOIN (SELECT customer_id FROM cart GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY COUNT(cart_id) DESC LIMIT 10) AS t ON c.customer_id = t.customer_id ORDER BY c.customer_id LIMIT 10
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.summary: Top 10 customer details are provided, with customer_id ranging from 1 to 10. The customers' names, email addresses, phone numbers, and dates of birth are included.

c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.question: what is the age of Aarav Naidu today
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.generated_sql: SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, date_of_birth, CURDATE()) AS age FROM customers WHERE name = 'Aarav Naidu'
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.summary: Aarav Naidu is 24 years old today.

c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.question: orders of 	Aarav Kulkarni
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.generated_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.total_amount, o.order_status FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.name = 'Aarav Kulkarni' AND o.order_status != 'Cancelled'
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.summary: Aarav Kulkarni has 1 order with order_id 5334, placed on 2025-06-26, with a total amount of 13190.0, and the order status is Shipped.

c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.question: what product did 	Aarav Kulkarni ordered
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.generated_sql: SELECT p.product_name FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE c.name = 'Aarav Kulkarni' AND o.order_status != 'Cancelled' LIMIT 100
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.summary: Aarav Kulkarni ordered the following products: Dumbbell Set 10kg, Yoga Mat Anti-Slip, Introduction to Algorithms, Atomic Habits, and Men Regular Fit T-Shirt.

c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.question: what is the total cost of 	Aarav Kulkarni
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS total_cost FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE c.name = 'Aarav Kulkarni' AND o.order_status != 'Cancelled'
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.summary: The total cost of Aarav Kulkarni's orders is 13190.0.

c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.question: plot the pie chart for the products and their prices
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.generated_sql: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity * p.price) AS total_price FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_status != 'Cancelled' GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY total_price DESC LIMIT 100
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.summary: The top 100 products by total price are listed, with Samsung Galaxy S23 having the highest total price of 39974467.0 and Tata Salt 1kg having the lowest total price of 12525.0.

c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.question: who all orderd Samsung Galaxy S23
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.generated_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, c.email, c.phone_number FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_name = 'Samsung Galaxy S23' AND o.order_status != 'Cancelled' LIMIT 100
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.summary: There are 50 customers who ordered Samsung Galaxy S23. The customers' names include Aarav Chopra, Aarav Kapoor, Aarav Malhotra, and others.

c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.question: who ordered more products
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.generated_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_products_ordered FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_status != 'Cancelled' GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY total_products_ordered DESC LIMIT 100
c2f81909-88ec-488d-ba4c-2e3ebeb231fe.summary: The top 100 customers who ordered the most products are listed. Aarav Desai has ordered the most products with a total of 150 products, followed by Aarav Chopra with 135 products, and Aarav Bhat with 124 products.
